titleStmt.title: SII 18.170: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 170. (B.K. No. 62 of 1934-35.) NIṬṬŪR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the Kallēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year [65], Raudri, Pushya śu. 5, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1140, December 15, Sunday f.d.t. ·37. There was however no saṁkrānti on that day.

It records a grant of land made by Samka-gāvuṇḍa and other residents of Niṭṭūr to a tank called Benakana-keṟe and states that Kalidēva had this inscription set up. A grant of land to god Mahādēva is also recorded at the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© © namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē
trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . ©
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasa
hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . svasti śrīma
ccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 65 neya raudrisaṁvatsarada
puṣyasu 5 Ādivāramuttarāyaṇasankrāṁti vyatī
pātadaṁdu niṭṭūra saṁkagāvuṇḍanuṁ samasta prajegaḷumirddu
ḷiya kaliyaṇaṁ kaṭṭisida benakanakeṟege biṭṭadharmma
Ā keṟeya keḷage gaddekamma 50 beddale matta 3 mane 1 Intini
tumaṁ sudharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisidaḍe vāraṇāsiyalu sāsi
ra kavileyaṁ sāsira brāhmaṇargge koṭṭa phala(ṁ) vintī dharmmavanaḷida
ḍe vāraṇāsiyalu kavilevaṁ brāhmaṇarumaṁ vadhemāḍida dōṣa .
janakananūnabhāgyaniḷayaṁ guṇisōmanudāttapuṇya
bhājaneyene peṁpuvetta sati dāsave tāyi vibhu ma
lli tannatammane mahadēvanāmavene mammaganīśvaraniṣṭa
deyvanītane kritakrityaneṁdu pogaḷguṁ dhare heggaḍe
kallimayyana . Intenisi negaḷda sōmana saṁntati ka
lidēvaneseva taṁdeya keṟeyaṁ bhrāntiḍe kaṭṭi
śāsanavaṁ taḍeyade niṟisi dharmmavaṁ koḷgoṁḍa .
© mahādēvara Aṁgabhōga nivēdyakke Ūriṁ paḍuvalu
beddale matta 2 hiriya keṟeya keḷage gadde kamma 20
dēvara bēṁṭake beddale matta 1 gadde kamma 5
Digital edition of SII 18.170 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
